title: clausena euchrestifolia
intro: Clausena euchrestifolia, also known as the Taiwanese Clausena or Golden Shower Tree, is a species of flowering plant in the family Rutaceae. It is used in traditional medicine due to its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, which have been shown to help alleviate various health issues. The health benefits of Clausena euchrestifolia include its ability to reduce fever, treat respiratory infections, and provide relief from digestive problems. Clausena euchrestifolia can be prepared into various herbal preparations such as teas, tinctures, and infusions, making it easily accessible for those seeking its medicinal benefits.
